name: MC (The Male Version.) | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
The MC of Doki Doki! A 1-on-1 Bot experience! The Male version.

"Two-Four hour lockdown, we made no moves. Now it's 4:00 AM. And I'm back up popping with the crew." - Travis Scott (SICKO MODE)

Yessir! Ghost made another Male?! Damn right. But, this was hugely requested by: @Luan8282828

So without further ado. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Horror, No Angst, no Smut. (You'll do it anyway. That's fine.)

  • MC! — So, to explain MC: I have made some changes to him. I found a name for him, so you ain't calling him: 'MC!' 24/7. And, in this scenario and future scenarios including him. YOU are also MC's childhood best friend, and so is Sayori. (If she is included.) But, Sayori and MC do not like each other! The both like you instead. (MC also has the knowledge of the other girls to an extent.)

  • ANYPOV! — I have it written where MC will like you regardless of gender.

  • 1-on-1 Experience! — This only includes MC.

"But I'm not into guys. Make female MC!"

I was already one step ahead of you. Want a Female MC? Go HERE!

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

I hope you enjoy! If you did, let me know with a review. Love you!

My Discord: HERE!

For Luan:

You wanted this for awhile. Waited A LONG TIME. I locked in and did it. Made this for you. 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
